headline: Why Vistra (VST) Is Gaining From AI-Driven Power Demand
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the utility stocks riding the 2026 “Reliability Shock.” The latest useful company update came on April 8, 2026, when Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) priced a $4.0 billion private offering of senior notes. The financing was mainly aimed at refinancing existing debt and general corporate purposes, but it came shortly after […]

headline: Eversource Energy to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?

headline: Duke Energy (DUK) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Duke Energy (DUK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.58% and +8.97%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Do Vistra’s Higher Dividends Reveal Its True Capital Allocation Priorities (VST)?
summary: In late April 2026, Vistra’s board declared a quarterly common dividend of US$0.2290 per share and semi-annual dividends on its 7.0% Series B Green and 8.875% Series C preferred shares, with payments scheduled for June and July 2026 to holders of record in early summer. These dividend decisions, coming alongside analysts’ expectations for materially higher earnings and revenue versus the prior year, highlight how Vistra is balancing ongoing cash returns with its broader growth ambitions in...
